title: Assess the role of discretion in enabling corruption in public offices. Suggest measures to balance discretion and accountability.
description: Q7. Assess the role of discretion in enabling corruption in public offices. Suggest measures to balance discretion and accountability. (10 M) Difficulty Level: Medium Reference: InsightsIAS Why the question Corruption in governance remains a persistent ethical challenge, especially where discretionary powers intersect with weak accountability.
